name: Ginger Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until fluffy.
3. Add molasses and eggs; mix well.
4. Combine flour, ground ginger, baking soda, and salt; add to mixture.
5. Blend in fresh and candied ginger.
6. Drop batter by teaspoonful onto parchment-covered baking sheets, about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for about 10 minutes or until lightly golden.
8. Cool.
Yield: 8 dozen Ginger Snaps
